place: Cape Yamu, Pa Klok, Thalang, Phuket, Thailand
title: Villa Amarasara — Beachfront Estate, Cape Yamu
blurb: A beachfront estate in the gated Cape Yamu community on Phuket's eastern coast — Oriental-modern architecture over 4,500 m², a 40-metre infinity pool above Phang Nga Bay, full-sized tennis court, cinema, golf simulator and six staff.
detail:
At Villa Amarasara, guests get the best of both worlds — a tradition-meets-modern estate inside the upscale Cape Yamu community on Phuket's eastern coast, with an enviable beachfront setting and majestic views over Phang Nga Bay and the Andaman Sea. The 4,500 m² villa is set on a 16,000 m² plot, wrapped in shuttered floor-to-ceiling glass beneath a hip-and-gable roof, with direct beach access yet complete privacy and exclusivity.

Distinct Oriental architecture meets crisp, white modern interiors across three storeys. Seven en-suite bedrooms — two on the main level and five above, including two master suites — sleep fourteen adults and two children, each framing spectacular sea views. The heart of the home is its 40-metre infinity pool, paired with an 8-person jacuzzi, an 8-metre kids' pool, a pool sala, indoor and outdoor dining and a rooftop bar.

Whether you want to wind down or turn it up, Amarasara delivers: a game room, cinema room, full-sized tennis court, fitness centre, golf simulator, multi-purpose indoor court, and steam and sauna rooms, plus kayaks and paddleboards for the bay. Six staff including a private chef look after the stay, in a secure gated community 21 km from Phuket International Airport and minutes from Royal Phuket Marina and Laguna Golf.

features.l: 40 m infinity pool over Phang Nga Bay
